claim_scope: public-interface-text-and-declared-release-facts-only; no behavioral, semantic, resource, representation-layout, performance, or full compatibility claim

controlled_facts.public_api: lossless normalized public declarations and imports
controlled_facts.supported_targets: the exact declared target set and per-target normalized interface
controlled_facts.minimum_toolchain: the declared minimum moon, moonc, and moonrun floors
controlled_facts.dependency_floors: the exact named direct module dependency floors

rule_ids.COMP02-CLASS-EXACT: All represented declarations, targets, toolchain, and dependency floors are exact.
rule_ids.COMP02-CLASS-ADDITIVE: All baseline declarations remain exact and only represented public surface or supported targets were added.
rule_ids.COMP02-INPUT-CLOSED: Every policy, release-fact, manifest, package, record, and evidence object is closed.
rule_ids.COMP02-MISSING-BASELINE: A missing or unsupported baseline is unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-INCOMPLETE-CANDIDATE: A partial candidate package or target inventory is unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-UNKNOWN-SYNTAX: Unrepresented normalized interface syntax is unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-AMBIGUOUS-MATCH: Duplicate declaration identities or otherwise ambiguous matching are unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-DUPLICATE-RECORD: Duplicate package or package-target records are unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-TOOLCHAIN-MISMATCH: Generation toolchain drift without an approved baseline migration is unknown.
rule_ids.COMP02-INTERRUPTED-RESULT: An interrupted or incomplete comparison cannot authorize release.
rule_ids.COMP02-DECLARATION-REMOVED: A removed public declaration is incompatible.
rule_ids.COMP02-DECLARATION-CHANGED: A changed public declaration kind, signature, constraints, or identity is incompatible.
rule_ids.COMP02-IMPORT-CHANGED: A changed normalized public import set is incompatible.
rule_ids.COMP02-SUPPORTED-TARGET-REMOVED: Removing a supported target is incompatible.
rule_ids.COMP02-SUPPORTED-TARGET-ADDED: Adding a fully represented supported target is additive.
rule_ids.COMP03-MINIMUM-TOOLCHAIN-DRIFT: Changing a declared minimum toolchain floor is incompatible and policy-visible.
rule_ids.COMP03-DEPENDENCY-FLOOR-DRIFT: Changing a direct dependency floor is incompatible and policy-visible.
rule_ids.COMP03-VERSION-NONCANONICAL: Baseline and candidate versions must be canonical SemVer without numeric overflow assumptions.
rule_ids.COMP03-VERSION-INSUFFICIENT: The candidate version must satisfy the class-owned minimum increment.
rule_ids.COMP04-CHANGELOG-REQUIRED: Every releasable class requires a matching changelog change-class entry.
rule_ids.COMP04-ADDED-SURFACE-REPORT-REQUIRED: An additive class requires an exact added-surface report.
rule_ids.COMP04-MIGRATION-REQUIRED: An incompatible pre-1.0 class requires a migration note.
rule_ids.COMP04-RFC-REQUIRED: An accepted RFC is required only when boundary, architecture, or governance impact is declared.
rule_ids.COMP04-CHANGE-CLASS-MISMATCH: Recorded changelog change class must equal the computed class.
